14#include "MSP430MCAsmInfo.h"
15#include "llvm/ADT/StringRef.h"
16using namespace llvm;
17
18void MSP430MCAsmInfo::anchor() { }
19
20MSP430MCAsmInfo::MSP430MCAsmInfo(StringRef TT) {
21 PointerSize = CalleeSaveStackSlotSize = 2;
22
23 CommentString = ";";
24
25 AlignmentIsInBytes = false;
26 UsesELFSectionDirectiveForBSS = true;
27}
